sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8854" key="a)nqrhnlw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρην-λώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n8854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">honeycombed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀ. καὶ πολύπορος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.916e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
